data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft.com utilizes a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and reliability across its services.
data.technical_spec: Distributed services allowing independent scaling and deployment, facilitated by containerization technologies.

data.title: Azure Cloud Integration
data.description: The website is heavily integrated with Azure services for robust infrastructure support.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging Azure’s global data center presence and services like Azure Active Directory and API Management.

data.title: Serverless Functions
data.description: Uses Azure Functions to trigger backend processes and tasks dynamically.
data.technical_spec: Implementing Functions as a Service (FaaS) to handle event-driven tasks efficiently.

data.title: Progressive Web Application (PWA)
data.description: Delivers a seamless user experience across web and mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes modern web capabilities to deliver app-like experiences using service workers and Web App Manifests.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for managing and routing API calls efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using Azure API Management solutions for reliable API routing and transformation.
